rows.title: MeTTa compatibility atom
rows.content: Lens can interpret exported Hyperon/MeTTa-style atom rows while Knitweb keeps fabric storage and OriginTrail keeps DKG resolution, publishing, and anchoring.

rows.title: MeTTa runtime boundary atom
rows.content: Hyperon/MeTTa remains the source runtime for Atomspace queries. Lens reads exported atoms as evidence; it does not store atoms, evaluate MeTTa programs, or execute grounded atoms.
